name.full: TomTom Maps & Traffic for Copilot Cowork

description.short: Live TomTom maps, routing, traffic and EV tools for Cowork.
description.full: Adds TomTom location intelligence to Microsoft Copilot Cowork: geocoding and place search, driving/EV route planning, real-time traffic, EV charging, and dynamic, live interactive map rendering. Skills correlate so search, routing, traffic and EV results are always shown on a map. Powered by the official TomTom MCP server via a gateway that keeps the API key server-side.

agentConnectors.description: TomTom location, routing, traffic, EV and live-map tools via the ABS MCP gateway (API key injected server-side).
